title: SLIP interface for Zephyr puck
description:
Zephyr network interface driver for SLIP over USB serial.

Implements Zephyr net_if API backed by SLIP framing to USB CDC ACM.

Features:
- Standard SLIP framing (RFC 1055)
- USB CDC ACM serial
- MTU configuration
- Flow control

This allows the puck to appear as a network interface to the border router PC.

Reference: Zephyr has existing SLIP support for native_sim, adapt for USB.
